name: Mexicano 777
description: '''Israel Perales Ortiz''' (September 1, 1972 – July 23, 2015), known professionally as '''Mexicano 777''', was a Puerto Rican rapper who gained fame across [[Latin America]], and in the [[United States]]. Originally from [[Yabucoa, Puerto Rico]], he was considered to be one of the pioneers of [[Latin hip hop]] and [[reggaeton]].
